title: Mellow Jamaican Iceberg Lettuce Wrap
description: A comforting, anti-inflammatory Jamaican-inspired wrap that pairs crisp iceberg lettuce with warm, spicy jerk-seasoned roasted sweet potato and black beans, finished with creamy avocado and a splash of lime.
instructions: Toss sweet potato cubes with melted coconut oil, grated ginger, minced garlic, and jerk seasoning until evenly coated.
Spread the sweet potato mixture on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes until tender and slightly caramelized.
Meanwhile, warm the black beans in a small saucepan over low heat, seasoning with a pinch of salt if desired.
In a bowl, combine the roasted sweet potato, warm black beans, and fresh cilantro, mixing gently.
Separate the iceberg lettuce leaves and wash them thoroughly, patting dry.
Fill each lettuce leaf with the sweet potato and bean mixture, then top with slices of avocado.
Drizzle lime juice over the wraps and serve immediately, or chill in the fridge for up to 2 hours for a cooler option.
Enjoy a soothing, anti-inflammatory Jamaican-inspired lunch on crisp lettuce.
